highlights.text: As I frequently discuss, I like to think of all price action in ES being comprised of three building blocks, each correlating with one of my setup types (Failed Breakdowns, Back-Test, Breakdowns).
Rallies to Back-Test the break down zone , but price needs a setup to do so, and this is typically my core setup & primary building block: The Failed Breakdown.

post_title: SPX Breaks Out A 2 Week Range. Can It Follow Through? March 25 Plan
